input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
# Questions resolving Feb 13-20
with open('market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    qs = []
    for row in reader:
        rd = row['resolution_date']
        if row['is_resolved'] == 'False' and rd >= '2026-02-13' and rd <= '2026-02-20':
            qs.append(f\"{row['qid']}|{rd}|{row['title'][:120]}\")
    qs.sort(key=lambda x: x.split('|')[1])
    for q in qs[:25]:
        print(q)
"

import json
# Search for Navalny toxin, T20 World Cup, Iran, Benfica Real Madrid
with open('articles/2026/02/12/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        if any(k in title for k in ['navalny toxin', 'navalny body', 'navalny tissue', 't20 world cup', 'pakistan cricket', 'ronda rousey', 'state of the union', 'democratic response']):
            print(a.get('title','')[:160])

python3 -c "
import json
# T20 World Cup - Pakistan Super 8 qualification
with open('articles/2026/02/12/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()
        if 'pakistan' in content and 't20 world cup' in content and ('super eight' in content or 'super 8' in content or 'qualify' in content):
            print(a.get('title','')[:160])
            for kw in ['super eight', 'super 8', 'qualify']:
                idx = content.find(kw)
                if idx >= 0:
                    print(f'  ...{content[max(0,idx-100):idx+200]}...')
                    break
            print('---')
" | head -15

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# T20 World Cup groups and standings
with open('articles/2026/02/12/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()
        if 't20 world cup' in content and 'group' in content and ('pakistan' in content):
            title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
            if 'pakistan' in title or 'group' in title or 'world cup' in title:
                print(a.get('title','')[:160])
                # Find group info
                for kw in ['group a', 'group b', 'group c', 'group d']:
                    idx = content.find(kw)
                    if idx >= 0:
                        print(f'  [{kw}]: ...{content[max(0,idx-50):idx+200]}...')
                print('---')
" | head -30
